name: Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology
meets_full_need_notes: Rose-Hulman does not guarantee to meet full demonstrated financial need. Average need met is approximately 60-65%. Strong merit aid program supplements need-based aid.
no_loan_notes: Loans are included in most financial aid packages at Rose-Hulman. No institutional no-loan policy.

merit_thresholds.notes: Rose-Hulman offers substantial merit scholarships including the Presidential Scholarship (up to full tuition), Dean's Scholarship, and Rose-Hulman Merit Award. Most admitted students receive some merit aid. Awards are renewable with continued GPA requirements.

ed_aid_implications: Rose-Hulman does not offer binding ED. EA applicants receive the same merit and need-based aid consideration.
appeal_policy: Students may request a review of their financial aid package by contacting the Office of Financial Aid with documentation of unusual or changed financial circumstances.
